Unstages all if paths is omitted/empty. */\n   240→  unstage(cwd: string, paths?: string[]): Promise<{ ok: boolean }> {\n   241→    return gitPost<{ ok: boolean }>('unstage', { cwd, paths })\n   242→  },\n   243→\n   244→  init(cwd: string): Promise<void> {\n   245→    return gitPost<void>('init', { cwd })\n   246→  },\n   247→\n   248→  diff(cwd: string): Promise<GitDiffResult> {\n   249→    return gitPost<GitDiffResult>('diff', { cwd })\n   250→  },\n   251→\n   252→  fileDiffs(cwd: string, baseBranch?: string): Promise<FileDiffEntry[]> {\n   253→    return gitPost<{ files: FileDiffEntry[] }>('file-diffs', { cwd, ...(baseBranch ? { baseBranch } : {}) }).then(r => r.files)\n   254→  },\n   255→\n   256→  createWorktree(\n   257→    cwd: string,\n   258→    baseBranch: string,\n   259→    newBranch: string,\n   260→    path?: string,\n   261→  ): Promise<GitWorktreeResult> {\n   262→    return gitPost<GitWorktreeResult>('create-worktree', { cwd, baseBranch, newBranch, ...(path ? { path } : {}) })\n   263→  },\n   264→\n   265→  removeWorktree(cwd: string, path: string, force = false): Promise<void> {\n   266→    return gitPost<void>('remove-worktree', { cwd, path, force })\n   267→  },\n   268→\n   269→  ghStatus(cwd?: string): Promise<GhStatusResult> {\n   270→    return gitPost<GhStatusResult>('gh-status', { ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}) })\n   271→  },\n   272→\n   273→  ghAuth(token: string, cwd?: string): Promise<GhAuthResult> {\n   274→    return gitPost<GhAuthResult>('gh-auth', { token, ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}) })\n   275→  },\n   276→\n   277→  forgeStatus(cwd?: string, remoteUrl?: string): Promise<ForgeStatusResult> {\n   278→    return gitPost<ForgeStatusResult>('forge-status', { ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}), ...(remoteUrl ? { remoteUrl } : {}) })\n   279→  },\n   280→\n   281→  forgeAuth(token: string, cwd?: string, remoteUrl?: string): Promise<ForgeAuthResult> {\n   282→    return gitPost<ForgeAuthResult>('forge-auth', { token, ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}), ...(remoteUrl ? { remoteUrl } : {}) })\n   283→  },\n   284→\n   285→  forgePrChecks(cwd: string, branch: string, remoteUrl?: string): Promise<PrCheck[]> {\n   286→    return gitPost<PrCheck[]>('forge-pr-checks', { cwd, branch, ...(remoteUrl ? { remoteUrl } : {}) })\n   287→  },\n   288→\n   289→  identity(cwd: string): Promise<GitIdentity> {\n   290→    return gitPost<GitIdentity>('identity', { cwd })\n   291→  },\n   292→\n   293→  setIdentity(cwd: string, name: string, email: string): Promise<GitIdentity> {\n   294→    return gitPost<GitIdentity>('identity', { cwd, name, email })\n   295→  },\n   296→\n   297→  prChecks(cwd: string, branch: string): Promise<PrCheck[]> {\n   298→    return gitPost<PrCheck[]>('pr-checks', { cwd, branch })\n   299→  },\n   300→\n   301→  generateCommitMessage(cwd: string, provider?: ProviderId, model?: string | null): Promise<{ message: string }> {\n   302→    return gitPost<{ message: string }>('generate-commit-message', {\n   303→      cwd,\n   304→      ...(provider ? { provider } : {}),\n   305→      ...(model ? { model } : {}),\n   306→    })\n   307→  },\n   308→}\n   309→\n   310→// ── Logic helpers (adapted from t3code GitActionsControl.logic) ──────\n   311→\n   312→export type GitActionIconName = 'commit' | 'push' | 'pr'\n   313→export type GitDialogAction = 'commit' | 'push' | 'create_pr'\n   314→\n   315→export interface GitActionMenuItem {\n   316→  id: 'commit' | 'push' | 'pr'\n   317→  label: string\n   318→  disabled: boolean\n   319→  icon: GitActionIconName\n   320→  kind: 'open_dialog' | 'open_pr'\n   321→  dialogAction?: GitDialogAction\n   322→}\n   323→\n   324→export interface GitQuickAction {\n   325→  label: string\n   326→  disabled: boolean\n   327→  kind: 'run_action' | 'run_pull' | 'open_pr' | 'show_hint'\n   328→  action?: GitStackedAction\n   329→  hint?: string\n   330→}\n   331→\n   332→export function buildMenuItems(\n   333→  gitStatus: GitStatusResult | null,\n   334→  isBusy: boolean,\n   335→): GitActionMenuItem[] {\n   336→  if (!gitStatus) return []\n   337→\n   338→  const hasBranch = gitStatus.branch !== null\n   339→  const hasChanges = gitStatus.hasWorkingTreeChanges\n   340→  const hasOpenPr = gitStatus.pr?.state === 'open'\n   341→  const isBehind = gitStatus.behindCount > 0\n   342→  const canCommit = !isBusy && hasChanges\n   343→  const canPush = !isBusy && hasBranch && !hasChanges && !isBehind && gitStatus.aheadCount > 0\n   344→  const canCreatePr = !isBusy && hasBranch && !hasChanges && !hasOpenPr && gitStatus.aheadCount > 0 && !isBehind\n   345→  const canOpenPr = !isBusy && hasOpenPr\n   346→\n   347→  return [\n   348→    { id: 'commit', label: 'Commit', disabled: !canCommit, icon: 'commit', kind: 'open_dialog', dialogAction: 'commit' },\n   349→    { id: 'push', label: 'Push', disabled: !canPush, icon: 'push', kind: 'open_dialog', dialogAction: 'push' },\n   350→    hasOpenPr\n   351→      ? { id: 'pr', label: 'Open PR', disabled: !canOpenPr, icon: 'pr', kind: 'open_pr' }\n   352→      : { id: 'pr', label: 'Create PR', disabled: !canCreatePr, icon: 'pr', kind: 'open_dialog', dialogAction: 'create_pr' },\n   353→  ]\n   354→}\n   355→\n   356→export function resolveQuickAction(\n   357→  gitStatus: GitStatusResult | null,\n   358→  isBusy: boolean,\n   359→  isDefaultBranch = false,\n   360→): GitQuickAction {\n   361→  if (isBusy) return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Git action in progress.' }\n   362→  if (!gitStatus) return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Git status is unavailable.' }\n   363→\n   364→  const hasBranch = gitStatus.branch !== null\n   365→  const hasChanges = gitStatus.hasWorkingTreeChanges\n   366→  const hasOpenPr = gitStatus.pr?.state === 'open'\n   367→  const isAhead = gitStatus.aheadCount > 0\n   368→  const isBehind = gitStatus.behindCount > 0\n   369→\n   370→  if (!hasBranch) return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Create and checkout a branch before pushing or opening a PR.' }\n   371→\n   372→  if (hasChanges) {\n   373→    if (hasOpenPr || isDefaultBranch) return { label: 'Commit & push', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push' }\n   374→    return { label: 'Commit, push & create PR', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push_pr' }\n   375→  }\n   376→\n   377→  if (!gitStatus.hasUpstream) {\n   378→    if (!isAhead) {\n   379→      if (hasOpenPr) return { label: 'Open PR', disabled: false, kind: 'open_pr' }\n   380→      return { label: 'Push', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'No local commits to push.' }\n   381→    }\n   382→    if (hasOpenPr || isDefaultBranch) return { label: 'Push', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push' }\n   383→    return { label: 'Push & create PR', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push_pr' }\n   384→  }\n   385→\n   386→  if (isAhead && isBehind) return { label: 'Sync branch', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Branch has diverged from upstream. Rebase/merge first.' }\n   387→  if (isBehind) return { label: 'Pull', disabled: false, kind: 'run_pull' }\n   388→\n   389→  if (isAhead) {\n   390→    if (hasOpenPr || isDefaultBranch) return { label: 'Push', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push' }\n   391→    return { label: 'Push & create PR', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push_pr' }\n   392→  }\n   393→\n   394→  if (hasOpenPr && gitStatus.hasUpstream) return { label: 'Open PR', disabled: false, kind: 'open_pr' }\n   395→\n   396→  return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Branch is up to date. No action needed.' }\n   397→}\n   398→\n   399→export function buildGitActionProgressStages(input: {\n   400→  action: GitStackedAction\n   401→  hasCustomCommitMessage: boolean\n   402→  hasWorkingTreeChanges: boolean\n   403→  forcePushOnly?: boolean\n   404→  pushTarget?: string\n   405→  featureBranch?: boolean\n   406→}): string[] {\n   407→  const branchStages = input.featureBranch ? ['Preparing feature branch...'] : []\n   408→  const shouldIncludeCommitStages = !input.forcePushOnly && (input.action === 'commit' || input.hasWorkingTreeChanges)\n   409→  const commitStages = !shouldIncludeCommitStages ? [] : input.hasCustomCommitMessage ? ['Committing...'] : ['Generating commit message...', 'Committing...']\n   410→  const pushStage = input.pushTarget ? `Pushing to ${input.pushTarget}...` : 'Pushing...'\n   411→  if (input.action === 'commit') return [...branchStages, ...commitStages]\n   412→  if (input.action === 'commit_push') return [...branchStages, ...commitStages, pushStage]\n   413→  return [...branchStages, ...commitStages, pushStage, 'Creating PR...']\n   414→}\n   415→\n   416→export function summarizeGitResult(result: GitStepResult): { title: string; description?: string } {\n   417→  if (result.push.status === 'skipped_no_remote') {\n   418→    const sha = result.commit.commitSha?.slice(0, 7)\n   419→    return {\n   420→      title: sha ? `Committed ${sha}` : 'Committed changes',\n   421→      description: 'No remote configured — push skipped. Add a remote with `git remote add <name> <url>` to enable push & PR.',\n   422→    }\n   423→  }\n   424→  if (result.pr.status === 'created' || result.pr.status === 'opened_existing') {\n   425→    const prNumber = result.pr.number ? ` #${result.pr.number}` : ''\n   426→    const title = `${result.pr.status === 'created' ? 'Created PR' : 'Opened PR'}${prNumber}`\n   427→    return result.pr.title ? { title, description: result.pr.title.slice(0, 72) } : { title }\n   428→  }\n   429→  if (result.push.status === 'pushed') {\n   430→    const sha = result.commit.commitSha?.slice(0, 7)\n   431→    const branch = result.push.upstreamBranch ?? result.push.branch\n   432→    return { title: `Pushed${sha ? ` ${sha}` : ''}${branch ? ` to ${branch}` : ''}`, description: result.commit.subject?.slice(0, 72) }\n   433→  }\n   434→  if (result.commit.status === 'created') {\n   435→    const sha = result.commit.commitSha?.slice(0, 7)\n   436→    return { title: sha ? `Committed ${sha}` : 'Committed changes', description: result.commit.subject?.slice(0, 72) }\n   437→  }\n   438→  return { title: 'Done' }\n   439→}\n   440→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. /**\n    40→   * When this value changes, git status is re-fetched.\n    41→   * Pass e.g. the selected thread's status or updatedAt.\n    42→   */\n    43→  refreshTrigger?: unknown\n    44→}\n    45→\n    46→// ── Sub-components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    47→\n    48→function ActionIcon({ icon }: { icon: 'commit' | 'push' | 'pr' }) {\n    49→  if (icon === 'commit') return <GitCommit className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    50→  if (icon === 'push') return <CloudUpload className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    51→  return <Github className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→function QuickActionIcon({ quickAction }: { quickAction: GitQuickAction }) {\n    55→  if (quickAction.kind === 'open_pr') return <Github className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    56→  if (quickAction.kind === 'run_pull') return <ArrowDownToLine className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    57→  if (quickAction.kind === 'run_action') {\n    58→    if (quickAction.action === 'commit') return <GitCommit className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    59→    if (quickAction.action === 'commit_push') return <CloudUpload className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    60→    return <Github className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    61→  }\n    62→  return <GitCommit className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→// ── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    66→\n    67→export function GitActionsControl({ cwd, refreshTrigger }: GitActionsControlProps) {\n    68→  const [gitStatus, setGitStatus] = useState<GitStatusResult | null>(null)\n    69→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)\n    70→  const [isBusy, setIsBusy] = useState(false)\n    71→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false)\n    72→  const [commitDialogOpen, setCommitDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n    73→  const [commitMessage, setCommitMessage] = useState('')\n    74→  const [diffOpen, setDiffOpen] = useState(false)\n    75→  const [ghSetupOpen, setGhSetupOpen] = useState(false)\n    76→  const [gitIdentityOpen, setGitIdentityOpen] = useState(false)\n    77→  const pendingPrAction = useRef<{ action: GitStackedAction; opts?: { commitMessage?: string; featureBranch?: boolean; forcePushOnly?: boolean } } | null>(null)\n    78→  const pendingIdentityAction = useRef<{ action: GitStackedAction; opts?: { commitMessage?: string; featureBranch?: boolean; forcePushOnly?: boolean } } | null>(null)\n    79→  const skipGhCheck = useRef(false)\n    80→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)\n    81→\n    82→  // ── Status refresh (event-driven, no polling) ─────────────────\n    83→\n    84→  const refreshStatus = useCallback(async () => {\n    85→    try {\n    86→      const status = await gitApi.status(cwd)\n    87→      setGitStatus(status)\n    88→    } catch {\n    89→      // silently ignore — status just won't update\n    90→    } finally {\n    91→      setIsLoading(false)\n    92→    }\n    93→  }, [cwd])\n    94→\n    95→  // Fetch on mount + whenever refreshTrigger changes (e.g. thread status)\n    96→  useEffect(() => {\n    97→    refreshStatus()\n    98→  }, [refreshStatus, refreshTrigger])\n    99→\n   100→  // Close menu on outside click\n   101→  useEffect(() => {\n   102→    if (!menuOpen) return\n   103→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n   104→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n   105→        setMenuOpen(false)\n   106→      }\n   107→    }\n   108→    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)\n   109→    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)\n   110→  }, [menuOpen])\n   111→\n   112→  // ── Derived state ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n   113→\n   114→  const isDefaultBranch = useMemo(() => {\n   115→    const b = gitStatus?.branch\n   116→    if (!b) return false\n   117→    return b === 'main' || b === 'master'\n   118→  }, [gitStatus?.branch])\n   119→\n   120→  const menuItems = useMemo(() => buildMenuItems(gitStatus, isBusy), [gitStatus, isBusy])\n   121→  const quickAction = useMemo(() => resolveQuickAction(gitStatus, isBusy, isDefaultBranch), [gitStatus, isBusy, isDefaultBranch])\n   122→\n   123→  // ── Actions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n   124→\n   125→  const runStackedAction = useCallback(async (\n   126→    action: GitStackedAction,\n   127→    opts?: { commitMessage?: string; featureBranch?: boolean; forcePushOnly?: boolean },\n   128→  ) => {\n   129→    // Pre-check gh for PR actions\n   130→    if (action === 'commit_push_pr' && !skipGhCheck.current) {\n   131→      try {\n   132→        const status = await gitApi.status(cwd)\n   133→        if (status.prProvider === 'github') {\n   134→          const ghStatus = await gitApi.ghStatus(cwd)\n   135→          if (!ghStatus.installed || !ghStatus.authenticated) {\n   136→            pendingPrAction.current = { action, opts }\n   137→            setGhSetupOpen(true)\n   138→            return\n   139→          }\n   140→        }\n   141→      } catch {\n   142→        // If check fails, proceed anyway\n   143→      }\n   144→    }\n   145→    skipGhCheck.current = false\n   146→\n   147→    setIsBusy(true)\n   148→    setMenuOpen(false)\n   149→    try {\n   150→      await gitApi.runStackedAction(cwd, action, {\n   151→        commitMessage: opts?.commitMessage,\n   152→        featureBranch: opts?.featureBranch,\n   153→      })\n   154→      await refreshStatus()\n   155→    } catch (err) {\n   156→      if (isMissingGitIdentityError(err)) {\n   157→        pendingIdentityAction.current = { action, opts }\n   158→        setGitIdentityOpen(true)\n   159→        return\n   160→      }\n   161→      toast.error('Action failed', { description: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error' })\n   162→    } finally {\n   163→      setIsBusy(false)\n   164→    }\n   165→  }, [cwd, refreshStatus])\n   166→\n   167→  const runPull = useCallback(async () => {\n   168→    setIsBusy(true)\n   169→    try {\n   170→      await gitApi.pull(cwd)\n   171→      await refreshStatus()\n   172→    } catch (err) {\n   173→      toast.error('Pull failed', { description: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error' })\n   174→    } finally {\n   175→      setIsBusy(false)\n   176→    }\n   177→  }, [cwd, refreshStatus])\n   178→\n   179→  const runQuickAction = useCallback(() => {\n   180→    if (quickAction.kind === 'open_pr' && gitStatus?.pr?.url) {\n   181→      window.open(gitStatus.pr.url, '_blank')\n   182→      return\n   183→    }\n   184→    if (quickAction.kind === 'run_pull') {\n   185→      runPull()\n   186→      return\n   187→    }\n   188→    if (quickAction.kind === 'show_hint') {\n   189→      return\n   190→    }\n   191→    if (quickAction.action) {\n   192→      if (quickAction.action === 'commit') {\n   193→        setCommitDialogOpen(true)\n   194→      } else {\n   195→        runStackedAction(quickAction.action)\n   196→      }\n   197→    }\n   198→  }, [quickAction, gitStatus?.pr?.url, runPull, runStackedAction])\n   199→\n   200→  const handleMenuItemClick = useCallback((item: GitActionMenuItem) => {\n   201→    if (item.disabled) return\n   202→    setMenuOpen(false)\n   203→    if (item.kind === 'open_pr' && gitStatus?.pr?.url) {\n   204→      window.open(gitStatus.pr.url, '_blank')\n   205→      return\n   206→    }\n   207→    if (item.dialogAction === 'push') {\n   208→      runStackedAction('commit_push', { forcePushOnly: true })\n   209→      return\n   210→    }\n   211→    if (item.dialogAction === 'create_pr') {\n   212→      runStackedAction('commit_push_pr')\n   213→      return\n   214→    }\n   215→    // commit → open dialog\n   216→    setCommitDialogOpen(true)\n   217→  }, [gitStatus?.pr?.url, runStackedAction])\n   218→\n   219→  const submitCommit = useCallback(() => {\n   220→    const msg = commitMessage.trim()\n   221→    setCommitDialogOpen(false)\n   222→    setCommitMessage('')\n   223→    runStackedAction('commit', { commitMessage: msg || undefined })\n   224→  }, [commitMessage, runStackedAction])\n   225→\n   226→  const submitCommitOnNewBranch = useCallback(() => {\n   227→    const msg = commitMessage.trim()\n   228→    setCommitDialogOpen(false)\n   229→    setCommitMessage('')\n   230→    runStackedAction('commit', { commitMessage: msg || undefined, featureBranch: true })\n   231→  }, [commitMessage, runStackedAction])\n   232→\n   233→  const handleGhReady = useCallback(() => {\n   234→    if (pendingPrAction.current) {\n   235→      const { action, opts } = pendingPrAction.current\n   236→      pendingPrAction.current = null\n   237→      skipGhCheck.current = true\n   238→      runStackedAction(action, opts)\n   239→    }\n   240→  }, [runStackedAction])\n   241→\n   242→  const handleGitIdentityReady = useCallback(() => {\n   243→    if (pendingIdentityAction.current) {\n   244→      const { action, opts } = pendingIdentityAction.current\n   245→      pendingIdentityAction.current = null\n   246→      runStackedAction(action, opts)\n   247→    }\n   248→  }, [runStackedAction])\n   249→\n   250→  // ── Render ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n   251→\n   252→  if (isLoading) {\n   253→    return <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin text-muted-foreground\" />\n   254→  }\n   255→\n   256→  return (\n   257→    <div className=\"relative inline-flex items-center gap-2\">\n   258→      <GhSetupDialog\n   259→        open={ghSetupOpen}\n   260→        onOpenChange={setGhSetupOpen}\n   261→        cwd={cwd}\n   262→        onReady={handleGhReady}\n   263→      />\n   264→      <GitIdentityDialog\n   265→        open={gitIdentityOpen}\n   266→        onOpenChange={setGitIdentityOpen}\n   267→        cwd={cwd}\n   268→        onReady={handleGitIdentityReady}\n   269→      />\n   270→      {/* View changes button */}\n   271→      {gitStatus?.hasWorkingTreeChanges && (\n   272→        <Button\n   273→          variant=\"ghost\"\n   274→          size=\"sm\"\n   275→          className=\"text-xs gap-1\"\n   276→          onClick={() => setDiffOpen(true)}\n   277→        >\n   278→          <Eye className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n   279→          View changes\n   280→        </Button>\n   281→      )}\n   282→\n   283→      {/* Quick action + menu */}\n   284→      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-0.5\" ref={menuRef}>\n   285→        <Button\n   286→          variant=\"outline\"\n   287→          size=\"sm\"\n   288→          className=\"rounded-r-none text-xs gap-1\"\n   289→          disabled={quickAction.disabled || isBusy}\n   290→          onClick={runQuickAction}\n   291→        >\n   292→ There's a **race condition** across 3 separate git commands:\n\n1. `git status --porcelain` — builds `indexStatusMap`\n2. `git diff --cached --numstat` — builds `indexFiles`\n3. The fallback adds anything in `indexStatusMap` but NOT in `indexFiles` with `+0 -0`\n\nBetween steps 1 and 2, the file state can change (linter reverted README.md). So the porcelain sees it as staged, but by the time the diff runs it's gone — the fallback then creates a ghost with `+0 -0`.\n\nThe fix: remove the fallback for the index. `git diff --cached --numstat` is the authoritative source for staged files — all real staged states (modifications, deletions, additions, mode changes) show up there."},{"type":"toolGroup","callIds":["019d1f5c-67bb-7dfb-b3d2-ae52f17d7a34","019d1f5c-7353-70a8-a789-48e470e80ea2"]},{"type":"text","content":"Both places fixed — `packages/gateway/src/services/git.ts` and `packages/gateway/src/routes/git.ts`. \n\nThe ghost appears because the porcelain and the diff stats are captured in separate git calls, so a file can briefly appear \"staged\" in the porcelain snapshot while the diff sees nothing. The fallback was blindly trusting the stale porcelain data. Now `git diff --cached --numstat` is the sole authority on what's staged."}]},{"id":"019d1f19-a9a4-71f9-b854-b85f221770b3-8","role":"user","content":"start the web preview so i can see this","segments":[{"type":"text","text":"start the web preview so i can see this"}]},{"id":"019d1f19-a9a4-71f9-b854-b85f221770b3-9","role":"assistant","content":"Preview is attached to the gateway at `localhost:8000`. }\n   103→\n   104→  if (!/^[a-z]+:\\/\\//i.test(trimmed) && isHtmlFilePath(trimmed)) {\n   105→    return {\n   106→      iframeSrc: `${getApiUrl()}/api/dev-file/${encodePreviewFilePath(trimmed)}`,\n 393→  });\n   394→\n   395→  /**\n   396→   * Race a Playwright page operation against an AbortSignal.\n   397→   * If the signal fires, we call `window.stop()` on the page (cancels in-flight\n   398→   * network requests and navigation) and reject with \"Cancelled\".\n   399→   */\n   400→  function withSignal<T>(op: Promise<T>, signal?: AbortSignal): Promise<T> {\n   401→    if (!signal) return => window.stop()).catch(() => { /* page may be gone */ });\n   410→        reject(new Error(\"Cancelled\"));\n   411→      };\n   412→      signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", onAbort, { once: true true; signal.removeEventListener(\"abort\", onAbort); reject(e); } },\n   416→      );\n   417→    });\n   418→  }\n   419→\n   420→  const driver: BrowserDriver = {\n   421→    async navigate(url: 495→  const [hoveredNode, setHoveredNode] = useState<string | null>(null)\n   496→  const [deployIp, setDeployIp] = useState<string | null>(null)\n   497→\n   498→  const headers = useCallback((): TopologyResponse)\n   515→        }\n   516→        setError(null)\n   517→      }\n   518→    } catch (err) {\n   519→      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to fetch topology')\n   520→    }\n   521→  }, [headers])\n   522→\n   523→  // Trigger network scan\n   524→  const handleScan = useCallback(async () => {\n   525→    setScanning(true)\n   526→    setError(null)\n   527→    try {\n   528→      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/network/scan`, {\n   529→        method: 'POST',\n   530→        headers: { ...headers(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n   531→        body: JSON.stringify({ deep: true }),\n   532→      })\n   533→      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Scan failed: ${res.status}`)\n   534→      await fetchTopology()\n   535→    } catch (err) {\n   536→      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Scan failed')\n   537→    } finally {\n   538→      setScanning(false)\n   539→    }\n   540→  }, [headers, fetchTopology])\n   541→\n   542→  // Initial load + polling\n   543→  useEffect(() => {\n   544→    void fetchTopology()\n   545→    const interval = setInterval(() => void fetchTopology(), 15_000)\n   546→    return () => clearInterval(interval)\n   547→  }, [fetchTopology])\n   548→\n   549→  // Resize observer\n   550→  useEffect(() => {\n   551→    const el = containerRef.current\n   552→    if (!el) return\n   553→    const ro = new ResizeObserver(([entry]) => {\n   554→      if (entry) {\n   555→        setDimensions({\n   556→          width: entry.contentRect.width,\n   557→          height: entry.contentRect.height,\n   558→        })\n   559→      }\n   560→    })\n   561→    ro.observe(el)\n   562→    return () => ro.disconnect()\n   563→  }, [])\n   564→\n   565→  // Build graph const links: GraphLink[] = []\n   571→\n   572→    // Gateway (center)\n   573→    nodes.push({ id: topology.gateway.id, data: topology.gateway })\n   574→\n   575→    // Connected devices\n   576→    for (const d of topology.devices) {\n   577→      nodes.push({ id: d.id, data: d })\n   578→      links.push({ source: d.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'connected' })\n   579→    }\n   580→\n   581→    // Mesh nodes\n   582→    for (const m of topology.meshNodes) {\n   583→      nodes.push({ id: m.id, data: m })\n   584→      links.push({ source: m.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'connected' })\n   585→    }\n   586→\n   587→    // Scanned hosts (skip if the host IP matches the gateway IP)\n   588→    for (const h of topology.hosts) {\n   589→      if (h.ip === topology.gateway.ip) continue\n   590→      nodes.push({ id: h.id, data: h })\n   591→      links.push({ source: h.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'scanned' })\n   592→    }\n   593→\n   594→    return { nodes: assignInitialPositions(nodes), links }\n   595→  }, [topology])\n   596→\n   597→  // Draw node\n   598→  const drawNode = useCallback((node: GraphNode, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, globalScale: number) => {\n   599→    const { data } = node\n   600→    const x = node.x ?? 0\n   601→    const y = node.y ?? 0\n   602→    const size = NODE_SIZES[data.type] ?? 8\n   603→    const color = NODE_COLORS[data.type] ?? '#6b7280'\n   604→    const isHovered = hoveredNode === node.id\n   605→    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === data.id\n   606→\n   607→    // Glow for gateway\n   608→    if (data.type === 'gateway') {\n   609→      ctx.beginPath()\n   610→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 4, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   611→      ctx.fillStyle = `${color}33`\n   612→      ctx.fill()\n   613→    }\n   614→\n   615→    // SSH ring indicator for hosts\n   616→    if (data.type === 'host' && 'sshReachable' in data && data.sshReachable) {\n   617→      ctx.beginPath()\n   618→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 3, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   619→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b55'\n   620→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 / globalScale\n   621→      ctx.stroke()\n   622→    }\n   623→\n   624→    // Outer ring on hover/select\n   625→    if (isHovered || isSelected) {\n   626→      ctx.beginPath()\n   627→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 2.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   628→      ctx.strokeStyle = color\n   629→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 / globalScale\n   630→      ctx.stroke()\n   631→    }\n   632→\n   633→    // Main circle\n   634→    ctx.beginPath()\n   635→    ctx.arc(x, y, size, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   636→    ctx.fillStyle = color\n   637→    ctx.fill()\n   638→\n   639→    // Online indicator dot\n   640→    if (data.online) {\n   641→      ctx.beginPath()\n   642→      ctx.arc(x + size * 0.65, y - size * 0.65, 2.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   643→      ctx.fillStyle = '#22c55e'\n   644→      ctx.fill()\n   645→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0a0a0a'\n   646→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5\n   647→      ctx.stroke()\n   648→    }\n   649→\n   650→    // OS icon inside node circle\n   651→    const osImg = getOsImage(data)\n   652→    if (osImg?.complete && osImg.naturalWidth > 0) {\n   653→      const iconSize = size * 1.1\n   654→      ctx.drawImage(osImg, x - iconSize / 2, y - iconSize / 2, iconSize, iconSize)\n   655→    }\n   656→\n   657→    // Label below\n   658→    const fontSize = Math.max(3.5, 10 / globalScale)\n   659→    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   660→    ctx.textAlign = 'center'\n   661→    ctx.textBaseline = 'top'\n   662→    ctx.fillStyle = isHovered ? '#ffffff' : '#a1a1aa'\n   663→    const label = data.name.length > 20 ? data.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : data.name\n   664→    ctx.fillText(label, x, y + size + 3)\n   665→\n   666→    // Type badge for gateway\n   667→    if (data.type === 'gateway') {\n   668→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(3, 8 / globalScale)}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   669→      ctx.fillStyle = '#22c55e'\n   670→      ctx.fillText('GATEWAY', x, y + size + 3 + fontSize + 2)\n   671→    } else if (data.type === 'host' && 'isRouter' in data && data.isRouter) {\n   672→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(3, 8 / globalScale)}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   673→      ctx.fillStyle = '#f59e0b'\n   674→      ctx.fillText('ROUTER', x, y + size + 3 + fontSize + 2)\n   675→    }\n   676→\n   677→    // Providers label below name (for devices and hosts with providers)\n   678→    const providers = ('providers' in data && Array.isArray(data.providers)) ? data.providers : []\n   679→    if (providers.length > 0) {\n   680→      const provFontSize = Math.max(2.5, 7 / globalScale)\n   681→      ctx.font = `${provFontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   682→      ctx.fillStyle = '#a855f7'\n   683→      const yOffset = data.type === 'gateway' ? fontSize * 2 + 6 : fontSize + 5\n   684→      ctx.fillText(providers.join(' \\u00b7 '), x, y + size + 3 + yOffset)\n   685→    }\n   686→\n   687→    // Port count badge for hosts (top-left of node)\n   688→    if (data.type === 'host' && 'openPorts' in data && data.openPorts.length > 0) {\n   689→      const portCount = data.openPorts.length\n   690→      const badgeFontSize = Math.max(2.5, 7 / globalScale)\n   691→      ctx.font = `bold ${badgeFontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   692→      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'\n   693→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'\n   694→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'\n   695→      // Small badge circle\n   696→      const bx = x - size * 0.65\n   697→      const by = y - size * 0.65\n   698→      ctx.beginPath()\n   699→      ctx.arc(bx, by, 3.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   700→      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'\n   701→      ctx.fill()\n   702→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'\n   703→      ctx.fillText(String(portCount), bx, by)\n   704→    }\n   705→  }, [hoveredNode, selectedNode])\n   706→\n   707→  // Draw link\n   708→  const drawLink = useCallback((link: GraphLink, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) => {\n   709→    const source = link.source as unknown as GraphNode\n   710→    const target = link.target as unknown as GraphNode\n   711→    if (!source?.x || !target?.x) return\n   712→\n   713→    ctx.beginPath()\n   714→    ctx.moveTo(source.x, source.y!)\n   715→    ctx.lineTo(target.x, target.y!)\n   716→\n   717→    if (link.type === 'connected') {\n   718→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f644'\n   719→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5\n   720→      ctx.setLineDash([])\n   721→    } else {\n   722→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b728033'\n   723→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5\n   724→      ctx.setLineDash([4, 4])\n   725→    }\n   726→    ctx.stroke()\n   727→    ctx.setLineDash([])\n   728→  }, [])\n   729→\n   730→  const deviceCount = topology\n   731→    ? The ghost must have been captured during the race between when the Write tool wrote `###` and when the linter reverted it. Let me find where git status is polled/cached to see if there's a stale data issue:Found it. There's a **race condition** across 3 separate git commands:\n\n1. `git status --porcelain` — builds `indexStatusMap`\n2. `git diff --cached --numstat` — builds `indexFiles`\n3. The fallback adds anything in `indexStatusMap` but NOT in `indexFiles` with `+0 -0`\n\nBetween steps 1 and 2, the file state can change (linter reverted README.md). So the porcelain sees it as staged, but by the time the diff runs it's gone — the fallback then creates a ghost with `+0 -0`.\n\nThe fix: remove the fallback for the index. `git diff --cached --numstat` is the authoritative source for staged files — all real staged states (modifications, deletions, additions, mode changes) show up there.Both places fixed — `packages/gateway/src/services/git.ts` and `packages/gateway/src/routes/git.ts`. \n\nThe ghost appears because the porcelain and the diff stats are captured in separate git calls, so a file can briefly appear \"staged\" in the porcelain snapshot while the diff sees nothing. files (git add). Unstages all if paths is omitted/empty. */\n   240→  unstage(cwd: string, paths?: string[]): Promise<{ ok: boolean }> {\n   241→    return gitPost<{ ok: boolean }>('unstage', { cwd, paths })\n   242→  },\n   243→\n   244→  init(cwd: string): Promise<void> {\n   245→    return gitPost<void>('init', { cwd })\n   246→  },\n   247→\n   248→  diff(cwd: string): Promise<GitDiffResult> {\n   249→    return gitPost<GitDiffResult>('diff', { cwd })\n   250→  },\n   251→\n   252→  fileDiffs(cwd: string, baseBranch?: string): Promise<FileDiffEntry[]> {\n   253→    return gitPost<{ files: FileDiffEntry[] }>('file-diffs', { cwd, ...(baseBranch ? { baseBranch } : {}) }).then(r => r.files)\n   254→  },\n   255→\n   256→  createWorktree(\n   257→    cwd: string,\n   258→    baseBranch: string,\n   259→    newBranch: string,\n   260→    path?: string,\n   261→  ): Promise<GitWorktreeResult> {\n   262→    return gitPost<GitWorktreeResult>('create-worktree', { cwd, baseBranch, newBranch, ...(path ? { path } : {}) })\n   263→  },\n   264→\n   265→  removeWorktree(cwd: string, path: string, force = false): Promise<void> {\n   266→    return gitPost<void>('remove-worktree', { cwd, path, force })\n   267→  },\n   268→\n   269→  ghStatus(cwd?: string): Promise<GhStatusResult> {\n   270→    return gitPost<GhStatusResult>('gh-status', { ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}) })\n   271→  },\n   272→\n   273→  ghAuth(token: string, cwd?: string): Promise<GhAuthResult> {\n   274→    return gitPost<GhAuthResult>('gh-auth', { token, ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}) })\n   275→  },\n   276→\n   277→  forgeStatus(cwd?: string, remoteUrl?: string): Promise<ForgeStatusResult> {\n   278→    return gitPost<ForgeStatusResult>('forge-status', { ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}), ...(remoteUrl ? { remoteUrl } : {}) })\n   279→  },\n   280→\n   281→  forgeAuth(token: string, cwd?: string, remoteUrl?: string): Promise<ForgeAuthResult> {\n   282→    return gitPost<ForgeAuthResult>('forge-auth', { token, ...(cwd ? { cwd } : {}), ...(remoteUrl ? { remoteUrl } : {}) })\n   283→  },\n   284→\n   285→  forgePrChecks(cwd: string, branch: string, remoteUrl?: string): Promise<PrCheck[]> {\n   286→    return gitPost<PrCheck[]>('forge-pr-checks', { cwd, branch, ...(remoteUrl ? { remoteUrl } : {}) })\n   287→  },\n   288→\n   289→  identity(cwd: string): Promise<GitIdentity> {\n   290→    return gitPost<GitIdentity>('identity', { cwd })\n   291→  },\n   292→\n   293→  setIdentity(cwd: string, name: string, email: string): Promise<GitIdentity> {\n   294→    return gitPost<GitIdentity>('identity', { cwd, name, email })\n   295→  },\n   296→\n   297→  prChecks(cwd: string, branch: string): Promise<PrCheck[]> {\n   298→    return gitPost<PrCheck[]>('pr-checks', { cwd, branch })\n   299→  },\n   300→\n   301→  generateCommitMessage(cwd: string, provider?: ProviderId, model?: string | null): Promise<{ message: string }> {\n   302→    return gitPost<{ message: string }>('generate-commit-message', {\n   303→      cwd,\n   304→      ...(provider ? { provider } : {}),\n   305→      ...(model ? { model } : {}),\n   306→    })\n   307→  },\n   308→}\n   309→\n   310→// ── Logic helpers (adapted from t3code GitActionsControl.logic) ──────\n   311→\n   312→export type GitActionIconName = 'commit' | 'push' | 'pr'\n   313→export type GitDialogAction = 'commit' | 'push' | 'create_pr'\n   314→\n   315→export interface GitActionMenuItem {\n   316→  id: 'commit' | 'push' | 'pr'\n   317→  label: string\n   318→  disabled: boolean\n   319→  icon: GitActionIconName\n   320→  kind: 'open_dialog' | 'open_pr'\n   321→  dialogAction?: GitDialogAction\n   322→}\n   323→\n   324→export interface GitQuickAction {\n   325→  label: string\n   326→  disabled: boolean\n   327→  kind: 'run_action' | 'run_pull' | 'open_pr' | 'show_hint'\n   328→  action?: GitStackedAction\n   329→  hint?: string\n   330→}\n   331→\n   332→export function buildMenuItems(\n   333→  gitStatus: GitStatusResult | null,\n   334→  isBusy: boolean,\n   335→): GitActionMenuItem[] {\n   336→  if (!gitStatus) return []\n   337→\n   338→  const hasBranch = gitStatus.branch !== null\n   339→  const hasChanges = gitStatus.hasWorkingTreeChanges\n   340→  const hasOpenPr = gitStatus.pr?.state === 'open'\n   341→  const isBehind = gitStatus.behindCount > 0\n   342→  const canCommit = !isBusy && hasChanges\n   343→  const canPush = !isBusy && hasBranch && !hasChanges && !isBehind && gitStatus.aheadCount > 0\n   344→  const canCreatePr = !isBusy && hasBranch && !hasChanges && !hasOpenPr && gitStatus.aheadCount > 0 && !isBehind\n   345→  const canOpenPr = !isBusy && hasOpenPr\n   346→\n   347→  return [\n   348→    { id: 'commit', label: 'Commit', disabled: !canCommit, icon: 'commit', kind: 'open_dialog', dialogAction: 'commit' },\n   349→    { id: 'push', label: 'Push', disabled: !canPush, icon: 'push', kind: 'open_dialog', dialogAction: 'push' },\n   350→    hasOpenPr\n   351→      ? { id: 'pr', label: 'Open PR', disabled: !canOpenPr, icon: 'pr', kind: 'open_pr' }\n   352→      : { id: 'pr', label: 'Create PR', disabled: !canCreatePr, icon: 'pr', kind: 'open_dialog', dialogAction: 'create_pr' },\n   353→  ]\n   354→}\n   355→\n   356→export function resolveQuickAction(\n   357→  gitStatus: GitStatusResult | null,\n   358→  isBusy: boolean,\n   359→  isDefaultBranch = false,\n   360→): GitQuickAction {\n   361→  if (isBusy) return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Git action in progress.' }\n   362→  if (!gitStatus) return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Git status is unavailable.' }\n   363→\n   364→  const hasBranch = gitStatus.branch !== null\n   365→  const hasChanges = gitStatus.hasWorkingTreeChanges\n   366→  const hasOpenPr = gitStatus.pr?.state === 'open'\n   367→  const isAhead = gitStatus.aheadCount > 0\n   368→  const isBehind = gitStatus.behindCount > 0\n   369→\n   370→  if (!hasBranch) return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Create and checkout a branch before pushing or opening a PR.' }\n   371→\n   372→  if (hasChanges) {\n   373→    if (hasOpenPr || isDefaultBranch) return { label: 'Commit & push', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push' }\n   374→    return { label: 'Commit, push & create PR', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push_pr' }\n   375→  }\n   376→\n   377→  if (!gitStatus.hasUpstream) {\n   378→    if (!isAhead) {\n   379→      if (hasOpenPr) return { label: 'Open PR', disabled: false, kind: 'open_pr' }\n   380→      return { label: 'Push', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'No local commits to push.' }\n   381→    }\n   382→    if (hasOpenPr || isDefaultBranch) return { label: 'Push', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push' }\n   383→    return { label: 'Push & create PR', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push_pr' }\n   384→  }\n   385→\n   386→  if (isAhead && isBehind) return { label: 'Sync branch', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Branch has diverged from upstream. Rebase/merge first.' }\n   387→  if (isBehind) return { label: 'Pull', disabled: false, kind: 'run_pull' }\n   388→\n   389→  if (isAhead) {\n   390→    if (hasOpenPr || isDefaultBranch) return { label: 'Push', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push' }\n   391→    return { label: 'Push & create PR', disabled: false, kind: 'run_action', action: 'commit_push_pr' }\n   392→  }\n   393→\n   394→  if (hasOpenPr && gitStatus.hasUpstream) return { label: 'Open PR', disabled: false, kind: 'open_pr' }\n   395→\n   396→  return { label: 'Commit', disabled: true, kind: 'show_hint', hint: 'Branch is up to date. No action needed.' }\n   397→}\n   398→\n   399→export function buildGitActionProgressStages(input: {\n   400→  action: GitStackedAction\n   401→  hasCustomCommitMessage: boolean\n   402→  hasWorkingTreeChanges: boolean\n   403→  forcePushOnly?: boolean\n   404→  pushTarget?: string\n   405→  featureBranch?: boolean\n   406→}): string[] {\n   407→  const branchStages = input.featureBranch ? ['Preparing feature branch...'] : []\n   408→  const shouldIncludeCommitStages = !input.forcePushOnly && (input.action === 'commit' || input.hasWorkingTreeChanges)\n   409→  const commitStages = !shouldIncludeCommitStages ? [] : input.hasCustomCommitMessage ? ['Committing...'] : ['Generating commit message...', 'Committing...']\n   410→  const pushStage = input.pushTarget ? `Pushing to ${input.pushTarget}...` : 'Pushing...'\n   411→  if (input.action === 'commit') return [...branchStages, ...commitStages]\n   412→  if (input.action === 'commit_push') return [...branchStages, ...commitStages, pushStage]\n   413→  return [...branchStages, ...commitStages, pushStage, 'Creating PR...']\n   414→}\n   415→\n   416→export function summarizeGitResult(result: GitStepResult): { title: string; description?: string } {\n   417→  if (result.push.status === 'skipped_no_remote') {\n   418→    const sha = result.commit.commitSha?.slice(0, 7)\n   419→    return {\n   420→      title: sha ? `Committed ${sha}` : 'Committed changes',\n   421→      description: 'No remote configured — push skipped. Add a remote with `git remote add <name> <url>` to enable push & PR.',\n   422→    }\n   423→  }\n   424→  if (result.pr.status === 'created' || result.pr.status === 'opened_existing') {\n   425→    const prNumber = result.pr.number ? ` #${result.pr.number}` : ''\n   426→    const title = `${result.pr.status === 'created' ? 'Created PR' : 'Opened PR'}${prNumber}`\n   427→    return result.pr.title ? { title, description: result.pr.title.slice(0, 72) } : { title }\n   428→  }\n   429→  if (result.push.status === 'pushed') {\n   430→    const sha = result.commit.commitSha?.slice(0, 7)\n   431→    const branch = result.push.upstreamBranch ?? result.push.branch\n   432→    return { title: `Pushed${sha ? ` ${sha}` : ''}${branch ? ` to ${branch}` : ''}`, description: result.commit.subject?.slice(0, 72) }\n   433→  }\n   434→  if (result.commit.status === 'created') {\n   435→    const sha = result.commit.commitSha?.slice(0, 7)\n   436→    return { title: sha ? `Committed ${sha}` : 'Committed changes', description: result.commit.subject?.slice(0, 72) }\n   437→  }\n   438→  return { title: 'Done' }\n   439→}\n   440→\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. /**\n    40→   * When this value changes, git status is re-fetched.\n    41→   * Pass e.g. the selected thread's status or updatedAt.\n    42→   */\n    43→  refreshTrigger?: unknown\n    44→}\n    45→\n    46→// ── Sub-components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    47→\n    48→function ActionIcon({ icon }: { icon: 'commit' | 'push' | 'pr' }) {\n    49→  if (icon === 'commit') return <GitCommit className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    50→  if (icon === 'push') return <CloudUpload className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    51→  return <Github className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→function QuickActionIcon({ quickAction }: { quickAction: GitQuickAction }) {\n    55→  if (quickAction.kind === 'open_pr') return <Github className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    56→  if (quickAction.kind === 'run_pull') return <ArrowDownToLine className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    57→  if (quickAction.kind === 'run_action') {\n    58→    if (quickAction.action === 'commit') return <GitCommit className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    59→    if (quickAction.action === 'commit_push') return <CloudUpload className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    60→    return <Github className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    61→  }\n    62→  return <GitCommit className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→// ── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    66→\n    67→export function GitActionsControl({ cwd, refreshTrigger }: GitActionsControlProps) {\n    68→  const [gitStatus, setGitStatus] = useState<GitStatusResult | null>(null)\n    69→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)\n    70→  const [isBusy, setIsBusy] = useState(false)\n    71→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false)\n    72→  const [commitDialogOpen, setCommitDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n    73→  const [commitMessage, setCommitMessage] = useState('')\n    74→  const [diffOpen, setDiffOpen] = useState(false)\n    75→  const [ghSetupOpen, setGhSetupOpen] = useState(false)\n    76→  const [gitIdentityOpen, setGitIdentityOpen] = useState(false)\n    77→  const pendingPrAction = useRef<{ action: GitStackedAction; opts?: { commitMessage?: string; featureBranch?: boolean; forcePushOnly?: boolean } } | null>(null)\n    78→  const pendingIdentityAction = useRef<{ action: GitStackedAction; opts?: { commitMessage?: string; featureBranch?: boolean; forcePushOnly?: boolean } } | null>(null)\n    79→  const skipGhCheck = useRef(false)\n    80→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)\n    81→\n    82→  // ── Status refresh (event-driven, no polling) ─────────────────\n    83→\n    84→  const refreshStatus = useCallback(async () => {\n    85→    try {\n    86→      const status = await gitApi.status(cwd)\n    87→      setGitStatus(status)\n    88→    } catch {\n    89→      // silently ignore — status just won't update\n    90→    } finally {\n    91→      setIsLoading(false)\n    92→    }\n    93→  }, [cwd])\n    94→\n    95→  // Fetch on mount + whenever refreshTrigger changes (e.g. thread status)\n    96→  useEffect(() => {\n    97→    refreshStatus()\n    98→  }, [refreshStatus, refreshTrigger])\n    99→\n   100→  // Close menu on outside click\n   101→  useEffect(() => {\n   102→    if (!menuOpen) return\n   103→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n   104→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n   105→        setMenuOpen(false)\n   106→      }\n   107→    }\n   108→    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler)\n   109→    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler)\n   110→  }, [menuOpen])\n   111→\n   112→  // ── Derived state ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n   113→\n   114→  const isDefaultBranch = useMemo(() => {\n   115→    const b = gitStatus?.branch\n   116→    if (!b) return false\n   117→    return b === 'main' || b === 'master'\n   118→  }, [gitStatus?.branch])\n   119→\n   120→  const menuItems = useMemo(() => buildMenuItems(gitStatus, isBusy), [gitStatus, isBusy])\n   121→  const quickAction = useMemo(() => resolveQuickAction(gitStatus, isBusy, isDefaultBranch), [gitStatus, isBusy, isDefaultBranch])\n   122→\n   123→  // ── Actions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n   124→\n   125→  const runStackedAction = useCallback(async (\n   126→    action: GitStackedAction,\n   127→    opts?: { commitMessage?: string; featureBranch?: boolean; forcePushOnly?: boolean },\n   128→  ) => {\n   129→    // Pre-check gh for PR actions\n   130→    if (action === 'commit_push_pr' && !skipGhCheck.current) {\n   131→      try {\n   132→        const status = await gitApi.status(cwd)\n   133→        if (status.prProvider === 'github') {\n   134→          const ghStatus = await gitApi.ghStatus(cwd)\n   135→          if (!ghStatus.installed || !ghStatus.authenticated) {\n   136→            pendingPrAction.current = { action, opts }\n   137→            setGhSetupOpen(true)\n   138→            return\n   139→          }\n   140→        }\n   141→      } catch {\n   142→        // If check fails, proceed anyway\n   143→      }\n   144→    }\n   145→    skipGhCheck.current = false\n   146→\n   147→    setIsBusy(true)\n   148→    setMenuOpen(false)\n   149→    try {\n   150→      await gitApi.runStackedAction(cwd, action, {\n   151→        commitMessage: opts?.commitMessage,\n   152→        featureBranch: opts?.featureBranch,\n   153→      })\n   154→      await refreshStatus()\n   155→    } catch (err) {\n   156→      if (isMissingGitIdentityError(err)) {\n   157→        pendingIdentityAction.current = { action, opts }\n   158→        setGitIdentityOpen(true)\n   159→        return\n   160→      }\n   161→      toast.error('Action failed', { description: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error' })\n   162→    } finally {\n   163→      setIsBusy(false)\n   164→    }\n   165→  }, [cwd, refreshStatus])\n   166→\n   167→  const runPull = useCallback(async () => {\n   168→    setIsBusy(true)\n   169→    try {\n   170→      await gitApi.pull(cwd)\n   171→      await refreshStatus()\n   172→    } catch (err) {\n   173→      toast.error('Pull failed', { description: err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error' })\n   174→    } finally {\n   175→      setIsBusy(false)\n   176→    }\n   177→  }, [cwd, refreshStatus])\n   178→\n   179→  const runQuickAction = useCallback(() => {\n   180→    if (quickAction.kind === 'open_pr' && gitStatus?.pr?.url) {\n   181→      window.open(gitStatus.pr.url, '_blank')\n   182→      return\n   183→    }\n   184→    if (quickAction.kind === 'run_pull') {\n   185→      runPull()\n   186→      return\n   187→    }\n   188→    if (quickAction.kind === 'show_hint') {\n   189→      return\n   190→    }\n   191→    if (quickAction.action) {\n   192→      if (quickAction.action === 'commit') {\n   193→        setCommitDialogOpen(true)\n   194→      } else {\n   195→        runStackedAction(quickAction.action)\n   196→      }\n   197→    }\n   198→  }, [quickAction, gitStatus?.pr?.url, runPull, runStackedAction])\n   199→\n   200→  const handleMenuItemClick = useCallback((item: GitActionMenuItem) => {\n   201→    if (item.disabled) return\n   202→    setMenuOpen(false)\n   203→    if (item.kind === 'open_pr' && gitStatus?.pr?.url) {\n   204→      window.open(gitStatus.pr.url, '_blank')\n   205→      return\n   206→    }\n   207→    if (item.dialogAction === 'push') {\n   208→      runStackedAction('commit_push', { forcePushOnly: true })\n   209→      return\n   210→    }\n   211→    if (item.dialogAction === 'create_pr') {\n   212→      runStackedAction('commit_push_pr')\n   213→      return\n   214→    }\n   215→    // commit → open dialog\n   216→    setCommitDialogOpen(true)\n   217→  }, [gitStatus?.pr?.url, runStackedAction])\n   218→\n   219→  const submitCommit = useCallback(() => {\n   220→    const msg = commitMessage.trim()\n   221→    setCommitDialogOpen(false)\n   222→    setCommitMessage('')\n   223→    runStackedAction('commit', { commitMessage: msg || undefined })\n   224→  }, [commitMessage, runStackedAction])\n   225→\n   226→  const submitCommitOnNewBranch = useCallback(() => {\n   227→    const msg = commitMessage.trim()\n   228→    setCommitDialogOpen(false)\n   229→    setCommitMessage('')\n   230→    runStackedAction('commit', { commitMessage: msg || undefined, featureBranch: true })\n   231→  }, [commitMessage, runStackedAction])\n   232→\n   233→  const handleGhReady = useCallback(() => {\n   234→    if (pendingPrAction.current) {\n   235→      const { action, opts } = pendingPrAction.current\n   236→      pendingPrAction.current = null\n   237→      skipGhCheck.current = true\n   238→      runStackedAction(action, opts)\n   239→    }\n   240→  }, [runStackedAction])\n   241→\n   242→  const handleGitIdentityReady = useCallback(() => {\n   243→    if (pendingIdentityAction.current) {\n   244→      const { action, opts } = pendingIdentityAction.current\n   245→      pendingIdentityAction.current = null\n   246→      runStackedAction(action, opts)\n   247→    }\n   248→  }, [runStackedAction])\n   249→\n   250→  // ── Render ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n   251→\n   252→  if (isLoading) {\n   253→    return <Loader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin text-muted-foreground\" />\n   254→  }\n   255→\n   256→  return (\n   257→    <div className=\"relative inline-flex items-center gap-2\">\n   258→      <GhSetupDialog\n   259→        open={ghSetupOpen}\n   260→        onOpenChange={setGhSetupOpen}\n   261→        cwd={cwd}\n   262→        onReady={handleGhReady}\n   263→      />\n   264→      <GitIdentityDialog\n   265→        open={gitIdentityOpen}\n   266→        onOpenChange={setGitIdentityOpen}\n   267→        cwd={cwd}\n   268→        onReady={handleGitIdentityReady}\n   269→      />\n   270→      {/* View changes button */}\n   271→      {gitStatus?.hasWorkingTreeChanges && (\n   272→        <Button\n   273→          variant=\"ghost\"\n   274→          size=\"sm\"\n   275→          className=\"text-xs gap-1\"\n   276→          onClick={() => setDiffOpen(true)}\n   277→        >\n   278→          <Eye className=\"h-3.5 w-3.5\" />\n   279→          View changes\n   280→        </Button>\n   281→      )}\n   282→\n   283→      {/* Quick action + menu */}\n   284→      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-0.5\" ref={menuRef}>\n   285→        <Button\n   286→          variant=\"outline\"\n   287→          size=\"sm\"\n   288→          className=\"rounded-r-none text-xs gap-1\"\n   289→          disabled={quickAction.disabled || isBusy}\n   290→          onClick={runQuickAction}\n   291→        >\n   292→ There's a **race condition** across 3 separate git commands:\n\n1. `git status --porcelain` — builds `indexStatusMap`\n2. `git diff --cached --numstat` — builds `indexFiles`\n3. The fallback adds anything in `indexStatusMap` but NOT in `indexFiles` with `+0 -0`\n\nBetween steps 1 and 2, the file state can change (linter reverted README.md). So the porcelain sees it as staged, but by the time the diff runs it's gone — the fallback then creates a ghost with `+0 -0`.\n\nThe fix: remove the fallback for the index. `git diff --cached --numstat` is the authoritative source for staged files — all real staged states (modifications, deletions, additions, mode changes) show up there."},{"type":"toolGroup","callIds":["019d1f5c-67bb-7dfb-b3d2-ae52f17d7a34","019d1f5c-7353-70a8-a789-48e470e80ea2"]},{"type":"text","content":"Both places fixed — `packages/gateway/src/services/git.ts` and `packages/gateway/src/routes/git.ts`. \n\nThe ghost appears because the porcelain and the diff stats are captured in separate git calls, so a file can briefly appear \"staged\" in the porcelain snapshot while the diff sees nothing. The fallback was blindly trusting the stale porcelain data. Now `git diff --cached --numstat` is the sole authority on what's staged."}]},{"id":"019d1f19-a9a4-71f9-b854-b85f221770b3-8","role":"user","content":"start the web preview so i can see this","segments":[{"type":"text","text":"start the web preview so i can see this"}]},{"id":"019d1f19-a9a4-71f9-b854-b85f221770b3-9","role":"assistant","content":"Preview is attached to the gateway at `localhost:8000`. }\n   103→\n   104→  if (!/^[a-z]+:\\/\\//i.test(trimmed) && isHtmlFilePath(trimmed)) {\n   105→    return {\n   106→      iframeSrc: `${getApiUrl()}/api/dev-file/${encodePreviewFilePath(trimmed)}`,\n 393→  });\n   394→\n   395→  /**\n   396→   * Race a Playwright page operation against an AbortSignal.\n   397→   * If the signal fires, we call `window.stop()` on the page (cancels in-flight\n   398→   * network requests and navigation) and reject with \"Cancelled\".\n   399→   */\n   400→  function withSignal<T>(op: Promise<T>, signal?: AbortSignal): Promise<T> {\n   401→    if (!signal) return => window.stop()).catch(() => { /* page may be gone */ });\n   410→        reject(new Error(\"Cancelled\"));\n   411→      };\n   412→      signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", onAbort, { once: true true; signal.removeEventListener(\"abort\", onAbort); reject(e); } },\n   416→      );\n   417→    });\n   418→  }\n   419→\n   420→  const driver: BrowserDriver = {\n   421→    async navigate(url: 495→  const [hoveredNode, setHoveredNode] = useState<string | null>(null)\n   496→  const [deployIp, setDeployIp] = useState<string | null>(null)\n   497→\n   498→  const headers = useCallback((): TopologyResponse)\n   515→        }\n   516→        setError(null)\n   517→      }\n   518→    } catch (err) {\n   519→      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to fetch topology')\n   520→    }\n   521→  }, [headers])\n   522→\n   523→  // Trigger network scan\n   524→  const handleScan = useCallback(async () => {\n   525→    setScanning(true)\n   526→    setError(null)\n   527→    try {\n   528→      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/network/scan`, {\n   529→        method: 'POST',\n   530→        headers: { ...headers(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n   531→        body: JSON.stringify({ deep: true }),\n   532→      })\n   533→      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Scan failed: ${res.status}`)\n   534→      await fetchTopology()\n   535→    } catch (err) {\n   536→      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Scan failed')\n   537→    } finally {\n   538→      setScanning(false)\n   539→    }\n   540→  }, [headers, fetchTopology])\n   541→\n   542→  // Initial load + polling\n   543→  useEffect(() => {\n   544→    void fetchTopology()\n   545→    const interval = setInterval(() => void fetchTopology(), 15_000)\n   546→    return () => clearInterval(interval)\n   547→  }, [fetchTopology])\n   548→\n   549→  // Resize observer\n   550→  useEffect(() => {\n   551→    const el = containerRef.current\n   552→    if (!el) return\n   553→    const ro = new ResizeObserver(([entry]) => {\n   554→      if (entry) {\n   555→        setDimensions({\n   556→          width: entry.contentRect.width,\n   557→          height: entry.contentRect.height,\n   558→        })\n   559→      }\n   560→    })\n   561→    ro.observe(el)\n   562→    return () => ro.disconnect()\n   563→  }, [])\n   564→\n   565→  // Build graph const links: GraphLink[] = []\n   571→\n   572→    // Gateway (center)\n   573→    nodes.push({ id: topology.gateway.id, data: topology.gateway })\n   574→\n   575→    // Connected devices\n   576→    for (const d of topology.devices) {\n   577→      nodes.push({ id: d.id, data: d })\n   578→      links.push({ source: d.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'connected' })\n   579→    }\n   580→\n   581→    // Mesh nodes\n   582→    for (const m of topology.meshNodes) {\n   583→      nodes.push({ id: m.id, data: m })\n   584→      links.push({ source: m.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'connected' })\n   585→    }\n   586→\n   587→    // Scanned hosts (skip if the host IP matches the gateway IP)\n   588→    for (const h of topology.hosts) {\n   589→      if (h.ip === topology.gateway.ip) continue\n   590→      nodes.push({ id: h.id, data: h })\n   591→      links.push({ source: h.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'scanned' })\n   592→    }\n   593→\n   594→    return { nodes: assignInitialPositions(nodes), links }\n   595→  }, [topology])\n   596→\n   597→  // Draw node\n   598→  const drawNode = useCallback((node: GraphNode, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, globalScale: number) => {\n   599→    const { data } = node\n   600→    const x = node.x ?? 0\n   601→    const y = node.y ?? 0\n   602→    const size = NODE_SIZES[data.type] ?? 8\n   603→    const color = NODE_COLORS[data.type] ?? '#6b7280'\n   604→    const isHovered = hoveredNode === node.id\n   605→    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === data.id\n   606→\n   607→    // Glow for gateway\n   608→    if (data.type === 'gateway') {\n   609→      ctx.beginPath()\n   610→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 4, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   611→      ctx.fillStyle = `${color}33`\n   612→      ctx.fill()\n   613→    }\n   614→\n   615→    // SSH ring indicator for hosts\n   616→    if (data.type === 'host' && 'sshReachable' in data && data.sshReachable) {\n   617→      ctx.beginPath()\n   618→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 3, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   619→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b55'\n   620→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 / globalScale\n   621→      ctx.stroke()\n   622→    }\n   623→\n   624→    // Outer ring on hover/select\n   625→    if (isHovered || isSelected) {\n   626→      ctx.beginPath()\n   627→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 2.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   628→      ctx.strokeStyle = color\n   629→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 / globalScale\n   630→      ctx.stroke()\n   631→    }\n   632→\n   633→    // Main circle\n   634→    ctx.beginPath()\n   635→    ctx.arc(x, y, size, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   636→    ctx.fillStyle = color\n   637→    ctx.fill()\n   638→\n   639→    // Online indicator dot\n   640→    if (data.online) {\n   641→      ctx.beginPath()\n   642→      ctx.arc(x + size * 0.65, y - size * 0.65, 2.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   643→      ctx.fillStyle = '#22c55e'\n   644→      ctx.fill()\n   645→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0a0a0a'\n   646→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5\n   647→      ctx.stroke()\n   648→    }\n   649→\n   650→    // OS icon inside node circle\n   651→    const osImg = getOsImage(data)\n   652→    if (osImg?.complete && osImg.naturalWidth > 0) {\n   653→      const iconSize = size * 1.1\n   654→      ctx.drawImage(osImg, x - iconSize / 2, y - iconSize / 2, iconSize, iconSize)\n   655→    }\n   656→\n   657→    // Label below\n   658→    const fontSize = Math.max(3.5, 10 / globalScale)\n   659→    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   660→    ctx.textAlign = 'center'\n   661→    ctx.textBaseline = 'top'\n   662→    ctx.fillStyle = isHovered ? '#ffffff' : '#a1a1aa'\n   663→    const label = data.name.length > 20 ? data.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : data.name\n   664→    ctx.fillText(label, x, y + size + 3)\n   665→\n   666→    // Type badge for gateway\n   667→    if (data.type === 'gateway') {\n   668→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(3, 8 / globalScale)}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   669→      ctx.fillStyle = '#22c55e'\n   670→      ctx.fillText('GATEWAY', x, y + size + 3 + fontSize + 2)\n   671→    } else if (data.type === 'host' && 'isRouter' in data && data.isRouter) {\n   672→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(3, 8 / globalScale)}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   673→      ctx.fillStyle = '#f59e0b'\n   674→      ctx.fillText('ROUTER', x, y + size + 3 + fontSize + 2)\n   675→    }\n   676→\n   677→    // Providers label below name (for devices and hosts with providers)\n   678→    const providers = ('providers' in data && Array.isArray(data.providers)) ? data.providers : []\n   679→    if (providers.length > 0) {\n   680→      const provFontSize = Math.max(2.5, 7 / globalScale)\n   681→      ctx.font = `${provFontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   682→      ctx.fillStyle = '#a855f7'\n   683→      const yOffset = data.type === 'gateway' ? fontSize * 2 + 6 : fontSize + 5\n   684→      ctx.fillText(providers.join(' \\u00b7 '), x, y + size + 3 + yOffset)\n   685→    }\n   686→\n   687→    // Port count badge for hosts (top-left of node)\n   688→    if (data.type === 'host' && 'openPorts' in data && data.openPorts.length > 0) {\n   689→      const portCount = data.openPorts.length\n   690→      const badgeFontSize = Math.max(2.5, 7 / globalScale)\n   691→      ctx.font = `bold ${badgeFontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   692→      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'\n   693→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'\n   694→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'\n   695→      // Small badge circle\n   696→      const bx = x - size * 0.65\n   697→      const by = y - size * 0.65\n   698→      ctx.beginPath()\n   699→      ctx.arc(bx, by, 3.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   700→      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'\n   701→      ctx.fill()\n   702→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'\n   703→      ctx.fillText(String(portCount), bx, by)\n   704→    }\n   705→  }, [hoveredNode, selectedNode])\n   706→\n   707→  // Draw link\n   708→  const drawLink = useCallback((link: GraphLink, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) => {\n   709→    const source = link.source as unknown as GraphNode\n   710→    const target = link.target as unknown as GraphNode\n   711→    if (!source?.x || !target?.x) return\n   712→\n   713→    ctx.beginPath()\n   714→    ctx.moveTo(source.x, source.y!)\n   715→    ctx.lineTo(target.x, target.y!)\n   716→\n   717→    if (link.type === 'connected') {\n   718→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f644'\n   719→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5\n   720→      ctx.setLineDash([])\n   721→    } else {\n   722→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b728033'\n   723→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5\n   724→      ctx.setLineDash([4, 4])\n   725→    }\n   726→    ctx.stroke()\n   727→    ctx.setLineDash([])\n   728→  }, [])\n   729→\n   730→  const deviceCount = topology\n   731→    ? 495→  const [hoveredNode, setHoveredNode] = useState<string | null>(null)\n   496→  const [deployIp, setDeployIp] = useState<string | null>(null)\n   497→\n   498→  const headers = useCallback(():   511→        const text = await res.text()\n   512→        if (text !== topologyJsonRef.current) {\n   513→          topologyJsonRef.current = text\n   514→          setTopology(JSON.parse(text) as TopologyResponse)\n   515→        }\n   516→        setError(null)\n   517→      }\n   518→    } catch (err) {\n   519→      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to fetch topology')\n   520→    }\n   521→  }, [headers])\n   522→\n   523→  // Trigger network scan\n   524→  const handleScan = useCallback(async () => {\n   525→    setScanning(true)\n   526→    setError(null)\n   527→    try {\n   528→      const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/api/network/scan`, {\n   529→        method: 'POST',\n   530→        headers: { ...headers(), 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n   531→        body: JSON.stringify({ deep: true }),\n   532→      })\n   533→      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Scan failed: ${res.status}`)\n   534→      await fetchTopology()\n   535→    } catch (err) {\n   536→      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Scan failed')\n   537→    } finally {\n   538→      setScanning(false)\n   539→    }\n   540→  }, [headers, fetchTopology])\n   541→\n   542→  // Initial load + polling\n   543→  useEffect(() => {\n   544→    void fetchTopology()\n   545→    const interval = setInterval(() => void fetchTopology(), 15_000)\n   546→    return () => clearInterval(interval)\n   547→  }, [fetchTopology])\n   548→\n   549→  // Resize observer\n   550→  useEffect(() => {\n   551→    const el = containerRef.current\n   552→    if (!el) return\n   553→    const ro = new ResizeObserver(([entry]) => {\n   554→      if (entry) {\n   555→        setDimensions({\n   556→          width: entry.contentRect.width,\n   557→          height: entry.contentRect.height,\n   558→        })\n   559→      }\n   560→    })\n   561→    ro.observe(el)\n   562→    return () => ro.disconnect()\n   563→  }, [])\n   564→\n   565→  // Build graph data\n   566→  const graphData = useMemo(() => {\n   567→    if (!topology) return { nodes: [] as GraphNode[], links: [] as GraphLink[] }\n   568→\n   569→    const nodes: GraphNode[] = []\n   570→    const links: GraphLink[] = []\n   571→\n   572→    // Gateway (center)\n   573→    nodes.push({ id: topology.gateway.id, data: topology.gateway })\n   574→\n   575→    // Connected devices\n   576→    for (const d of topology.devices) {\n   577→      nodes.push({ id: d.id, data: d })\n   578→      links.push({ source: d.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'connected' })\n   579→    }\n   580→\n   581→    // Mesh nodes\n   582→    for (const m of topology.meshNodes) {\n   583→      nodes.push({ id: m.id, data: m })\n   584→      links.push({ source: m.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'connected' })\n   585→    }\n   586→\n   587→    // Scanned hosts (skip if the host IP matches the gateway IP)\n   588→    for (const h of topology.hosts) {\n   589→      if (h.ip === topology.gateway.ip) continue\n   590→      nodes.push({ id: h.id, data: h })\n   591→      links.push({ source: h.id, target: 'gateway', type: 'scanned' })\n   592→    }\n   593→\n   594→    return { nodes: assignInitialPositions(nodes), links }\n   595→  }, [topology])\n   596→\n   597→  // Draw node\n   598→  const drawNode = useCallback((node: GraphNode, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, globalScale: number) => {\n   599→    const { data } = node\n   600→    const x = node.x ?? 0\n   601→    const y = node.y ?? 0\n   602→    const size = NODE_SIZES[data.type] ?? 8\n   603→    const color = NODE_COLORS[data.type] ?? '#6b7280'\n   604→    const isHovered = hoveredNode === node.id\n   605→    const isSelected = selectedNode?.id === data.id\n   606→\n   607→    // Glow for gateway\n   608→    if (data.type === 'gateway') {\n   609→      ctx.beginPath()\n   610→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 4, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   611→      ctx.fillStyle = `${color}33`\n   612→      ctx.fill()\n   613→    }\n   614→\n   615→    // SSH ring indicator for hosts\n   616→    if (data.type === 'host' && 'sshReachable' in data && data.sshReachable) {\n   617→      ctx.beginPath()\n   618→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 3, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   619→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#f59e0b55'\n   620→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 / globalScale\n   621→      ctx.stroke()\n   622→    }\n   623→\n   624→    // Outer ring on hover/select\n   625→    if (isHovered || isSelected) {\n   626→      ctx.beginPath()\n   627→      ctx.arc(x, y, size + 2.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   628→      ctx.strokeStyle = color\n   629→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 / globalScale\n   630→      ctx.stroke()\n   631→    }\n   632→\n   633→    // Main circle\n   634→    ctx.beginPath()\n   635→    ctx.arc(x, y, size, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   636→    ctx.fillStyle = color\n   637→    ctx.fill()\n   638→\n   639→    // Online indicator dot\n   640→    if (data.online) {\n   641→      ctx.beginPath()\n   642→      ctx.arc(x + size * 0.65, y - size * 0.65, 2.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   643→      ctx.fillStyle = '#22c55e'\n   644→      ctx.fill()\n   645→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0a0a0a'\n   646→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5\n   647→      ctx.stroke()\n   648→    }\n   649→\n   650→    // OS icon inside node circle\n   651→    const osImg = getOsImage(data)\n   652→    if (osImg?.complete && osImg.naturalWidth > 0) {\n   653→      const iconSize = size * 1.1\n   654→      ctx.drawImage(osImg, x - iconSize / 2, y - iconSize / 2, iconSize, iconSize)\n   655→    }\n   656→\n   657→    // Label below\n   658→    const fontSize = Math.max(3.5, 10 / globalScale)\n   659→    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   660→    ctx.textAlign = 'center'\n   661→    ctx.textBaseline = 'top'\n   662→    ctx.fillStyle = isHovered ? '#ffffff' : '#a1a1aa'\n   663→    const label = data.name.length > 20 ? data.name.slice(0, 18) + '\\u2026' : data.name\n   664→    ctx.fillText(label, x, y + size + 3)\n   665→\n   666→    // Type badge for gateway\n   667→    if (data.type === 'gateway') {\n   668→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(3, 8 / globalScale)}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   669→      ctx.fillStyle = '#22c55e'\n   670→      ctx.fillText('GATEWAY', x, y + size + 3 + fontSize + 2)\n   671→    } else if (data.type === 'host' && 'isRouter' in data && data.isRouter) {\n   672→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.max(3, 8 / globalScale)}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   673→      ctx.fillStyle = '#f59e0b'\n   674→      ctx.fillText('ROUTER', x, y + size + 3 + fontSize + 2)\n   675→    }\n   676→\n   677→    // Providers label below name (for devices and hosts with providers)\n   678→    const providers = ('providers' in data && Array.isArray(data.providers)) ? data.providers : []\n   679→    if (providers.length > 0) {\n   680→      const provFontSize = Math.max(2.5, 7 / globalScale)\n   681→      ctx.font = `${provFontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   682→      ctx.fillStyle = '#a855f7'\n   683→      const yOffset = data.type === 'gateway' ? fontSize * 2 + 6 : fontSize + 5\n   684→      ctx.fillText(providers.join(' \\u00b7 '), x, y + size + 3 + yOffset)\n   685→    }\n   686→\n   687→    // Port count badge for hosts (top-left of node)\n   688→    if (data.type === 'host' && 'openPorts' in data && data.openPorts.length > 0) {\n   689→      const portCount = data.openPorts.length\n   690→      const badgeFontSize = Math.max(2.5, 7 / globalScale)\n   691→      ctx.font = `bold ${badgeFontSize}px -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`\n   692→      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'\n   693→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'\n   694→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'\n   695→      // Small badge circle\n   696→      const bx = x - size * 0.65\n   697→      const by = y - size * 0.65\n   698→      ctx.beginPath()\n   699→      ctx.arc(bx, by, 3.5, 0, 2 * Math.PI)\n   700→      ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6'\n   701→      ctx.fill()\n   702→      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'\n   703→      ctx.fillText(String(portCount), bx, by)\n   704→    }\n   705→  }, [hoveredNode, selectedNode])\n   706→\n   707→  // Draw link\n   708→  const drawLink = useCallback((link: GraphLink, ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D) => {\n   709→    const source = link.source as unknown as GraphNode\n   710→    const target = link.target as unknown as GraphNode\n   711→    if (!source?.x || !target?.x) return\n   712→\n   713→    ctx.beginPath()\n   714→    ctx.moveTo(source.x, source.y!)\n   715→    ctx.lineTo(target.x, target.y!)\n   716→\n   717→    if (link.type === 'connected') {\n   718→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f644'\n   719→      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5\n   720→      ctx.setLineDash([])\n   721→    } else {\n   722→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#6b728033'\n   723→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5\n   724→      ctx.setLineDash([4, 4])\n   725→    }\n   726→    ctx.stroke()\n   727→    ctx.setLineDash([])\n   728→  }, [])\n   729→\n   730→  const deviceCount = topology\n   731→    ? 1 + topology.devices.length + topology.meshNodes.length + topology.hosts.length\n   732→    : 0\n   733→\n   734→  return (\n   735→    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col\">\n   736→      {/* Header */}\n   737→      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between gap-2 border-b px-4 py-3 shrink-0\">\n   738→        <div className=\"flex min-w-0 items-center gap-2\">\n   739→          <Wifi className=\"h-4 w-4 text-primary\" />\n   740→          <h2 className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">Network</h2>\n   741→          {deviceCount > 0 && (\n   742→            <Badge variant=\"secondary\" className=\"w-[4.75rem] justify-center px-1 text-[10px] tabular-nums\">\n   743→              {deviceCount} {deviceCount === 1 ? user-initiated scroll gestures (wheel/touch) so we don't\n    30→  // confuse layout-induced scrollTop changes (tool cards collapsing)\n    31→  // with the user intentionally scrolling up.\n    32→  44→    const handleWheel = (e: WheelEvent) => {\n    45→      markUserScroll()\n    46→      if (e.deltaY < 0 && stickToBottomRef.current) {\n    47→        setStickToBottom(false)\n    48→        stickToBottomRef.current = false\n    49→      }\n    50→    }\n    51→\n    52→    el.addEventListener('wheel', handleWheel, { passive: true })\n    53→    el.addEventListener('touchstart', markUserScroll, { passive: true })\n    54→    return () => {\n    55→      el.removeEventListener('wheel', handleWheel)\n    56→      el.removeEventListener('touchstart', markUserScroll)\n    57→ distanceFromBottom < STICKY_BOTTOM_THRESHOLD_PX\n    66→    const scrollingUp = el.scrollTop < prevScrollTopRef.current\n    67→    prevScrollTopRef.current = el.scrollTop\n    68→\n    69→    setIsAtBottom(nextIsAtBottom)\n    70→    setStickToBottom((prev) => {\n    71→      // If the user is actively scrolling up, never re-enable stick-to-bottom\n    72→      // even if we're still near the bottom edge.\n    73→      if (scrollingUp && userScrollingRef.current) {\n    74→        stickToBottomRef.current = false\n    75→        return false\n    76→      }\n    77→      const next = nextIsAtBottom ? true : prev\n    78→      stickToBottomRef.current = next\n    79→      return next\n    80→    })\n    81→  }, [])\n    82→\n    83→  const scrollToBottom = useCallback((behavior: VirtualScrollBehavior = 'smooth') => {\n    84→    const el = scrollRef.current\n    85→    if (!el) return\n    86→    el.scrollTo({ top: el.scrollHeight, behavior })\n    87→  }, [])\n    88→\n    89→  useLayoutEffect(() => {\n    90→    updateBottomState()\n    91→  }, [updateBottomState, childItems.length, loading])\n    92→\n    93→  useLayoutEffect(() => {\n    94→    const count = childItems.length\n    95→    const wasEmpty = prevChildCount.current === 0\n    96→    const finishedLoading = prevLoadingRef.current && !loading\n    97→\n    98→    prevChildCount.current = count\n stickToBottomRef.current = true\n   104→      scrollToBottom('auto')\n   105→    }\n   106→  }, [childItems.length, loading, scrollToBottom])\n   107→\n   108→  // Continuous rAF loop: while stickToBottom is active, poll every frame\n   109→  // so tool-card expansions/collapses (which may not trigger a\n   110→  // ResizeObserver on the content wrapper) still keep us pinned.\n   111→  useEffect(() => {\n   112→    if (!stickToBottom || loading) return\n   113→    const el = scrollRef.current\n   114→    if (!el) return\n   115→    let id: number\n   116→    const tick = () => {\n   117→      if (!stickToBottomRef.current) return // user scrolled up — stop immediately\n   118→      const dist = el.scrollHeight - el.scrollTop - el.clientHeight\n   119→      if (dist > 1) el.scrollTo({ top: el.scrollHeight, behavior: 'auto' })\n   120→      id = requestAnimationFrame(tick)\n   121→    }\n   122→    id = requestAnimationFrame(tick)\n   123→    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(id)\n   124→  }, [stickToBottom, loading])\n   125→\n   126→  useLayoutEffect(() => {\n   127→    const contentEl = contentRef.current\n   128→    if (!contentEl || typeof ResizeObserver === 'undefined') return\n   129→\n   130→    const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {\n   131→      if (!stickToBottomRef.current) {\n   132→        updateBottomState()\n   133→
